title: エンディング（ノーマル）

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur's first three years in the Twinkle Series
have come to an end.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A while has passed since the post-Arima Kinen
hubbub. Just as I'm starting to think that things
have calmed down...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Got it. I'm gonna head to training then.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Ah, please wait a second.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Okay, I'm ready. Shall we?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Uh, what?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You're gonna train, right? I'll join you... as a
friend!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Something tells me you just wanna verify the
results of that experiment you mentioned the
other day.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Very astute, Shakur. It makes things much easier
if you already understand.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Hey, we're going.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I'm ready! ♪

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Sigh. What is it today, Fine?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I'm joining you for training, of course! As a friend!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...
And what's your story, Cafe?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I'd like to see how long I can hold my own against
you now.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: ...As a friend.
choice_data_list: You've sure got a lot of friends.
You've sure got a lot of friends.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Were you actually listening?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Everyone's sayin' they want to prepare to take me
down.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Is that what it sounded like?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Isn't that how you wanted it to sound?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
There's no benefit for me in running with you now.
If you wanna race me...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Do it at the racecourse. I'll take you on anytime.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: As... your friend?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
As the heroic champion of the people, come to
take down your strongest foe.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Foe? But that makes you sound like a villain.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
That's exactly what I'm saying. The lower I go, the
higher the rest of you can.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Everyone else already sees me as a villain
anyways.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: But you're enjoying yourself, right?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Yeah. What about it?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Hmph... They just wouldn't give up today.
choice_data_list: That's how much they want to race you.
That's how much they want to race you.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Bunch of weirdos.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume
text_block_list.text: U-um, excuse me! Shakur!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Yeah?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
...
I'm going to surpass you one day!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Sure, maybe no one rates me right now... and no
one really gets me yet. But all the same...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna surpass you and prove what I can do!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Heh.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Do whatever you want. There's no point in tellin'
me, though.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
You know where I'll be. ...Meet me there before I
forget about you.
